title: SPW Modpack
description: A modpack designed for the private server "SPW"
body:
This modpack is designed for our private Russian-language server "SPW". It provides all mods needed to join our community and a richer, more enjoyable gameplay experience in a welcoming atmosphere.

🎯What's Inside:

🛠 Tech & Automation: Mods for complex machines, engineering, and automation to streamline your projects.

🗺 Exploration & World: Explore new biomes, caves, and structures on a more beautiful and diverse map.

🏡 Building & Decor: An expanded library of blocks and furniture to create detailed and cozy builds in any style.

⚙️ Performance: Optimized for smooth gameplay and enhanced with quality-of-life improvements.

📌 How to Join:
Our server is private. To play, you must join our community. All access information and rules are on our [Discord](https://discord.gg/bzn9BF7KJr) server.

If you're looking for a friendly place to explore, build, and create with others, we'd love to have you!
